evals.name: consolidate-three-email-senders
evals.prompt: Mam v projektu tri funkce co posilaji email a kazda to dela trochu jinak. send_invite_email(user_id, role) v src/auth/invites.py posila pres SMTP, ma retry 3x. notify_user(user, template, data) v src/notifications/user.py pouziva SendGrid API, loguje do audit.log. send_staff_alert(message, recipients) v src/admin/alerts.py je sync SMTP bez retry, ale pridava X-Priority header. Chci to sjednotit do jednoho moduluu — at uz to neni tak rozsypane a muzeme tam snadno pridat rate limiting. Naplanuj mi to.
evals.expected_output: Plan invoking designing-abstractions skill. Should produce Abstraction Strategy artifact listing: concern-layers (transport/retry/observability/priority), invariants (logging), public API = named wrappers (send_invite_email, notify_user, send_staff_alert preserved), internal = single dispatcher taking EmailRequest domain object. Should explicitly reject send(type='invite', ...) stringly-typed approach. Should reference Rule of Three / Metz. Should NOT add rate limiting in same PR (Beck's separate-change rule).

evals.name: new-notification-module-greenfield
evals.prompt: Potrebuju novy modul na posilani notifikaci. Projekt je v Pythonu, FastAPI backend. Musi podporovat email (pres SES), Slack (webhook) a push notifikace (FCM). Kazdy notifikacni kanal ma jine parametry a jine error handling. Nekteri useri maji nastaveny fallback — kdyz email selze, zkusi Slack. Napis mi design.
evals.expected_output: Design using Ports & Adapters / Stable Dependencies. Should produce Abstraction Strategy: NotificationRequest domain object (Parse Don't Validate at boundary), NotificationChannel protocol/ABC with send() contract, adapters per channel (EmailAdapter, SlackAdapter, PushAdapter), orchestrator handling fallback logic. Should identify invariants (logging, retry policy, user preferences). Should avoid stringly-typed send(channel='email'). Should NOT have boolean flags controlling behavior.

evals.name: extract-validation-helper
evals.prompt: Napis mi helper funkci na validaci user inputu — potrebuju ze tri formularu (registrace, checkout, profile update) validovat email, telefon a ICO. Zatim to je v kazdem controlleru zvlast a kopiruje se to.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger Grep-first discipline (check if similar validators exist). Should apply Parse, Don't Validate — produce Value Objects: Email, PhoneNumber, ICO as types with parsing constructors, not boolean validators. Should warn against a single validate(input, type='email') dispatcher. Each VO has one canonical parsing entry point. Should mention primitive obsession fix.

evals.name: negative-fix-typo
evals.prompt: Oprav preklep na radku 42 v src/utils/helpers.py — je tam 'recieve' misto 'receive'.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT invoke designing-abstractions skill. Trivial one-line fix, no abstraction involved. Just make the edit.

evals.name: negative-bug-fix
evals.prompt: Mam bug — kdyz user klikne na 'Logout' v mobile view, aplikace padne s TypeError: Cannot read property 'session' of undefined. Najdi to a oprav.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT invoke designing-abstractions. This is a bug fix — should use systematic-debugging instead. No abstraction design needed.
